name: Home Furniture SA
suggested_pitch: Fixing broken product images and adding a hero banner could make your online showroom match the quality of your physical one.
message_email:
Subject: Quick wins for homefurnituresa.com

Hi,

I came across Home Furniture while researching furniture stores in Riyadh. Your sofa range and bilingual setup show real effort, but I noticed two things that might be holding back online enquiries.

Several product images on the shop page aren't loading — visitors see gray placeholders instead of your furniture. The page also jumps straight into a product grid with no hero banner or welcome message to set the tone.

Fixing the images and adding a short visual banner at the top could make a real difference in how customers perceive your store online.

Would you be open to a free 15-minute walkthrough of these quick improvements?

Best regards
message_whatsapp: Hi — I checked out homefurnituresa.com and your product range is solid. I noticed many product images aren't loading on the shop page and there's no hero banner to welcome visitors. Fixing those two things could make a big difference in online enquiries. Happy to walk through it in a quick call if useful.
